title: Interactive Todo List
specification: {"id":"todo-list-v2","version":1,"title":"My Todo List","layout":"single","components":[{"type":"Card","props":{"title":"Add New Task","description":"Create a new todo item"},"children":[{"type":"Grid","props":{"cols":3,"gap":2},"children":[{"type":"Input","id":"todo-input","props":{"placeholder":"Enter task title...","type":"text"}},{"type":"Select","id":"priority-select","props":{"placeholder":"Priority","options":[{"value":"P0","label":"P0 Critical"},{"value":"P1","label":"P1 High"},{"value":"P2","label":"P2 Important"},{"value":"P3","label":"P3 Medium"},{"value":"P4","label":"P4 Normal"}]}},{"type":"Button","props":{"children":"Add Task","variant":"default"}}]}]},{"type":"Grid","props":{"cols":3,"gap":4},"children":[{"type":"Card","props":{"title":"Total Tasks","description":"All todos"},"children":[{"type":"Badge","props":{"children":"{{userData.todos?.length || 0}}","variant":"secondary"}}]},{"type":"Card","props":{"title":"Completed","description":"Done tasks"},"children":[{"type":"Badge","props":{"children":"{{userData.todos?.filter(t => t.completed).length || 0}}","variant":"default"}}]},{"type":"Card","props":{"title":"Pending","description":"Active tasks"},"children":[{"type":"Badge","props":{"children":"{{userData.todos?.filter(t => !t.completed).length || 0}}","variant":"outline"}}]}]},{"type":"Card","props":{"title":"Progress","description":"Task completion rate"},"children":[{"type":"Progress","props":{"value":42}}]}]}
